creator: michal.berger@intel.com
text:
And just to note, this locale issue does affect other tooling as well. For instance:

...
autoreconf --install --symlink -f # this is basically perl running
panic: locale.c: 4560: Could not change LC_CTYPE locale to C.UTF-8, errno=22
...

So in the above perl is also affected. In this case exporting LC_ALL=C does help, but just the LC_CTYPE does not.
